problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
